goal: P0 convergence: remove app entry split logic, formalize a single active mainline baseline, and mark non-mainline directories as boundary/legacy so active development scope is clear.
constraints: Do not add new gameplay or UI features.
Keep legacy code available as archive/reference; only remove it from active entry/mainline.
Prefer minimal diffs focused on entry convergence and repository boundary clarity.
deliverables: Single active app entry in src/App.tsx without query-based flow splitting.
Updated docs/current-baseline.md with explicit single mainline anchors and legacy/archive directory boundaries.
Repository boundary updates so .vite/backups/review/src_new are not treated as active mainline development scope.
